description: Create a C4 model architecture diagram for an Internet Banking System in draw.io using the requirements provided in ~/Desktop/c4_requirements.txt. The diagram file must be saved as ~/Desktop/c4_banking.drawio and contain two pages: a 'System Context' diagram (including the banking system, customer, and external E-mail and Mainframe systems) and a 'Container' diagram (including the Web App, SPA, Mobile App, API, and Database containers with their interactions). Apply standard C4 notation using blue for internal elements, gray for external elements, and a cylinder shape for the database. Export the 'System Context' page as a PNG image to ~/Desktop/c4_banking.png.
